issues.description: Action type 'SearchDeck' is incorrect. The effect describes looking at 5 cards and revealing/adding one; this should be 'RevealFromHand' or a custom search. SearchDeck typically searches the entire deck, not a specific top-N pile.

Filter uses 'ByCost' with maxCost 5, but the card text specifies filtering by TYPE (green {East Blue} type, excluding Nami). Filter should use 'ByType' or 'ByName' conditions, not cost-based filtering.
Missing the core mechanic: 'look at top 5 cards' constraint. The DSL does not restrict the search to the top 5 cards of deck.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained by card text and appears to be erroneous/orphaned logic.
The effect should allow revealing UP TO 1 card (optional), then place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL does not capture the ordering/placement of remaining cards back to deck.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 green {East Blue} type card other than [Nami] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
